sql_array: CREATE TABLE TestTable (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, value DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO TestTable (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'TestValue1', 123.45), (2, 'TestValue2', NULL), (3, 'AnotherTestValue', 987.65);
SELECT * FROM TestTable WHERE name ILIKE 'test%';
SELECT id, name, (CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 'No Value' ELSE 'Has Value' END) AS value_status FROM TestTable WHERE name ILIKE '%Value%';
SELECT id, name FROM TestTable WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM TestTable WHERE value IS NOT NULL) ILIKE '1%';
SELECT id, name FROM TestTable WHERE value + 1 > 130 AND name ILIKE 'TestVal%';
SELECT id, name FROM TestTable WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY' AND name ILIKE '%' || '2' || '%';
WITH RankedValues AS (SELECT id, value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY value DESC) as rn FROM TestTable) SELECT id, name FROM RankedValues WHERE rn = 1 AND name ILIKE 'Another%';
CREATE TABLE NestedTest (parent_id INT, child_id INT, CONSTRAINT fk_parent FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES TestTable(id));
INSERT INTO NestedTest (parent_id, child_id) VALUES (1, 1), (1, 2), (2, NULL);
SELECT trace_on('user_log', 'failed_log') FROM TestTable WHERE value IS NOT NULL OR name ILIKE 'Test%';
SELECT a.id, a.name, b.child_id FROM TestTable a JOIN NestedTest b ON a.id = b.parent_id WHERE b.child_id IS NULL AND a.name ILIKE 'Test%';
SELECT id, name, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY name) AS name_count FROM TestTable GROUP BY id, name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND name ILIKE '%Test%';
ALTER TABLE TestTable ADD COLUMN is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE;
SELECT id, name FROM TestTable WHERE name ILIKE ANY(ARRAY['TestValue1', 'TestValue2', 'NonExistent%']);
